feedItems.description: allocated £27.9m to Children's Social Care (≈£213 per resident)
allocated £16.1m to Environment & Streets (≈£123 per resident)
allocated £49.7m to Adult Social Care (≈£380 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £104 (5.1%) to £2155
